content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement for the Exchange of Energy Management System Model Data
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_2

open std.strings

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Types
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Definitions
type Party = {
    name: string,
    is_transmission_owner: bool
}

type ReviewingRepresentative = {
    name: string,
    title: string,
    party: Party,
    has_executed_certificate: bool,
    has_competitive_duties: bool
}

type ConfidentialInformation = {
    description: string,
    is_technical: bool
}

type NonDisclosureCertificate = {
    reviewer: ReviewingRepresentative,
    signed_date: string
}

type ThirdPartyRequest = {
    requestor: string,
    purpose: string
}

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Entities
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Parties
entity party: Party

@ Clause 2 – Reviewing Representatives
entity reviewing_representative: ReviewingRepresentative

@ Clause 4 – Confidential Information
entity confidential_information: ConfidentialInformation

@ Clause 2 – Non‑Disclosure Certificate
entity non_disclosure_certificate: NonDisclosureCertificate

@ Clause 6 – Third‑Party Requests
entity third_party_request: ThirdPartyRequest

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Rules (deontic requirements)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 4 – Definition of Confidential Information (energy‑management‑system model data)
rule O confidential_information_is_technical:
    confidential_information.is_technical always

@ Clause 2 – A Reviewing Representative must have executed a certificate
rule O reviewing_rep_must_have_certificate:
    reviewing_representative.has_executed_certificate always

@ Clause 5 – Disclosure to third parties is prohibited without prior written approval
rule F disclose_to_third_party_without_approval:
    let prohibited = not (third_party_request.requestor = "DisclosingParty") in
    prohibited always

@ Clause 7 – Confidential Information remains the property of the Disclosing Party
rule O ownership_remains_with_disclosing:
    true always

@ Clause 9 – Confidential Information must be clearly marked as “Confidential”
rule O confidential_information_must_be_marked:
    let marked = confidential_information.description != "" in
    marked always

@ Clause 10 – The Agreement survives until terminated by the Parties
rule O agreement_survives_until_termination:
    true always

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Hypothesis under test
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis: “Confidential Information shall only include technical information.”
rule O hypothesis_confidential_information_is_technical:
    confidential_information.is_technical always
```
